title: Tempus
description: Tempus is a simple mod that automates world backups with configurations to ensure data safety.
body:
# ☁️ Tempus – A Simple Server Backup Mod

Tempus is a lightweight yet effective backup mod for Minecraft servers, designed to provide easy-to-use backup functionality without unnecessary complexity. Whether you're running a small private server or a larger community, Tempus ensures that your world is safe with minimal setup.

🌟 Features
- Manual Backups – Easily create backups using the ```/backup``` command.
- Event-Based Backups – Automatically trigger backups every specific amount of time.
- Server-Side Logging – Monitor backup activity directly in the server console.
- Lightweight & Efficient – Designed to have minimal performance impact.
- Configurable Backup Interval – Set custom intervals for automatic backups with the ```/backup set interval``` command (in hours and minutes).
- Max Backup Files – Limit the number of backup files with the ```/backup set maxbackups``` command to manage storage.
- Current Settings Display – View the current backup interval and max backup limit using the ```/backup get``` commands.

🛠 Usage
- Install the Mod – Place Tempus.jar in your server’s mods folder.
- Use the Command – Type ```/backup <arguments>``` in the server console or in-game (with 
permissions).

⚠️ Note: This is my first Fabric mod, so use at your own risk! However, it has been tested for stability.
